data.name: Horny Farm
data.detailed_description:
A young man, tired of city life, arrives at the village where some of his relatives once lived. They let him stay for free in exchange for taking care of the land, bonding with the townspeople, and making something profitable out of the abandoned place.

Once he arrives, he gets to work building his new life and meets the girls in the village — and damn, they're HOT!

The girls, intrigued by such a young and attractive guy, decide to “lend him a hand” fitting in... which leads to all sorts of steamy situations, sometimes even with more than one girl at a time.

💜 Emily: The mayor’s youngest daughter, around 22 years old. Super responsible, passionate about her job, and irresistibly flirty. She spends her days taking care of cows and offers to help the protagonist milk them and handle large animals — even volunteering herself as a "test subject."

🧡 Ember: Emily’s best friend. A free spirit who rides her horse everywhere and loves getting lost in the forest. This 24-year-old stunner is always up for adventure, anywhere and anytime. She teaches the protagonist how to tame wild horses (and her along the way), and takes him to incredible spots where they can enjoy some time alone.

💚 Delia: A cheerful, bubbly 20-year-old who loves working the fields. She shares a very special bond with Pansy. The protagonist often visits her garden, and among the carrots and tomato plants, spicy things tend to happen.

💗 Pansy: The village cook. This 23-year-old wins everyone over with her food and her... impressive figure. Her relationship with Delia goes beyond friendship, and the protagonist knows exactly how to take advantage of that.

💙 Zoya: A 25-year-old who’s helped her dad at the most popular shop in town since she was a kid. Outgoing and carefree, she’s always ready to “help the protagonist out” whenever needed and often seeks out his company. She has a strong interest in one of the village girls, just like Adam.

🤍 Harper: A classic tsundere who treats everyone harshly. She's 20 and acts like a fierce guard dog. Jealous of how the other girls connect with the protagonist, she seeks “justice,” expecting him to come begging for her affection. Adam and Zoya help her open up — in every way.

FEATURES

  • Finally: animations! Some girls feature a special animated scene.

  • Visual Novel++ Format: Each girl has different story arcs that complete her own narrative.

  • No Censorship!: We've removed censorship from the images (we’ll add an option later to censor them as preferred).

  • Gallery: Fill an image album as you progress through the story and revisit the chapters you've completed.

  • Choose the Girl: Decide which girl to pursue as the story unfolds.

  • Flashback: Go back in the story at any time to change a decision or relive a moment.

  • Smooth Navigation: Choose whether text progresses automatically or skip it to reach your favorite part.

  • Immersive Audio: Including music, sound effects, voices, and "other effects." Adjust volume settings independently or mute everything.

PLEASE NOTE

  • All characters depicted and visually represented in this game are over 18 years old, and no real or identifiable minors were used in the production of this game.

  • Help us out! If you think you can improve the narrative in your language, feel free to send us your suggestions via email or message us on our Steam page.

  • We're still working on it: All updates and improvements we develop will be added to the game at no additional cost.

data.short_description: Tired of his overwhelming routine in the city, Adam is given the opportunity to change his life. He ends up moving to a village where he meets a bunch of hot girls. They are more than willing to “help” him with whatever he needs and show him just how “good” of friends they are with each other.
data.supported_languages: 英文, 西班牙文 - 西班牙, 簡體中文, 韓文, 日文, 俄文

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統 *: WIN XP/Vista/7/8/10/11
  • 處理器: 2 GHz
  • 記憶體: 2048 MB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: DirectX 9 Compatible Graphics Card
  • 儲存空間: 2048 MB 可用空間
